description: Manage native Cadre formulas and local wisps

preconditions.requirement: Every project-scoped packet call includes root
If a required packet returns ok:false, halt and report the packet error

packetFlow.instruction: Resolve the project root with `cadre_project` using `action: "root"`.

Call `cadre_workflow` with `workflow: "formula"` and the requested native formula operation as structured JSON arguments: list, show, cook, wisp_create, wisp_list, wisp_update_step, wisp_squash, wisp_burn, or pour.

Use `pour` for reviewed persistent output; it routes generated spec and plan JSON through normal `cadre-newtrack` creation with formula trace fields. Local wisps remain under `cadre/local/wisps/` until squashed or burned; `wisp_squash` records a durable digest and control commit.
Summarize available formulas, generated draft tracks, canonical JSON artifacts, or packet errors.

forbiddenActions: Do not recreate Cadre control-plane, native event/message state, index, worktree, provider, merge, or cleanup state with shell commands
Do not read or write Markdown projections as canonical state
Do not use Markdown payload fields, legacy Markdown import, or prompt-side state repair
